title: stachys graeca
intro: Stachys graeca, also known as Greek betony, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Stachys graeca include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of depression and digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Stachys graeca include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to the affected areas for relief.
